<?php /** * RSASSA_PSS_params * * As defined in https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc4055#section-3.1 * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * RSASSA_PSS_params * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class RSASSA_PSS_params { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'children' => [ 'hashAlgorithm' => [ 'constant' => 0, 'optional' => true, 'explicit' => true, //'default' => 'sha1Identifier' ] + HashAlgorithm::MAP, 'maskGenAlgorithm' => [ 'constant' => 1, 'optional' => true, 'explicit' => true, //'default' => 'mgf1SHA1Identifier' ] + MaskGenAlgorithm::MAP, 'saltLength' => [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_INTEGER, 'constant' => 2, 'optional' => true, 'explicit' => true, 'default' => 20 ], 'trailerField' => [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_INTEGER, 'constant' => 3, 'optional' => true, 'explicit' => true, 'default' => 1 ] ] ]; }
